attribution_note: Requested as 'Meta AI'. Client-side, the widget is Zendesk's messaging Virtual Assistant (labeled 'Dermalogica's Virtual Assistant · AI'). The underlying model is not verifiable from the browser; reported as the Dermalogica/Zendesk assistant.
metric: screenshot-observed (Zendesk iframe re-mounts on each turn, so DOM/WS timing was unreliable) — treat FAQ latency as approximate/directional

results.a: Yes, we offer free shipping as one of our shipping options. (+ quick-reply: shipping options)

We gladly accept returns for any Dermalogica.com purchase within 30 days of the order date. New or gently used items in original packaging. No return shipping, handling, or restocking fees. (+ 'View article')

results.q: I have dry, dull skin. Which product do you recommend?
results.a: ❌ Did NOT recommend a product. Replied 'Please share a few details and I'll connect you with someone from our team' and opened a human lead-capture form (Name/email, 3 steps). Escalation locked the chat.

stats.product_rec_behaviour: escalates to human lead-capture (no in-chat recommendation)

note: Strong, fast FAQ/policy answers, but does not do product recommendations — it escalates to a human and collects contact details. Like DigitalGenius, this means it should NOT be compared head-to-head on product-recommendation latency.
